name: Estimated Glomerular Filtration Rate (eGFR) Test Codes
description: CPT and LOINC codes for estimated glomerular filtration rate (eGFR) and creatinine tests used to assess kidney function. Used in kidney health evaluation for patients with diabetes (KED) and chronic kidney disease (CKD) monitoring measures.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets
